testcase.name: test_refresh_with_remember_true_keeps_30d

failure.message: AssertionError: refresh should keep 30d TTL, got 604800 assert 1987200 <= 30 + where 1987200 = abs((604800 - 2592000))

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_iter8_test.py:130: in test_refresh_with_remember_true_keeps_30d assert abs(refresh_max - REFRESH_30D) <= TOLERANCE, ( E AssertionError: refresh should keep 30d TTL, got 604800 E assert 1987200 <= 30 E + where 1987200 = abs((604800 - 2592000))

testcase.name: test_login_with_remember_sets_30d_refresh

failure.message: AssertionError: expected ~2592000s (30d), got 604800 assert 1987200 <= 30 + where 1987200 = abs((604800 - 2592000))

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_iter8_test.py:101: in test_login_with_remember_sets_30d_refresh assert abs(refresh_max - REFRESH_30D) <= TOLERANCE, ( E AssertionError: expected ~2592000s (30d), got 604800 E assert 1987200 <= 30 E + where 1987200 = abs((604800 - 2592000))
